components.label: Untimely responses
components.evidence: 3.1% of cases not answered on time

components.label: Closed without relief
components.evidence: 62% of closed cases ended without monetary or non-monetary relief

components.label: Issue concentration
components.evidence: 23.9% of complaints share one top issue

summary: Between 2025-01-01 and 2026-06-29, the CFPB published 1,081 complaints about Capital One. Volume is steady (last 3 months averaged 64 per month versus 64 before). The most common issue is "Problem with a purchase shown on your statement" (24% of complaints), concentrated in credit card or prepaid card. The company responded on time to 97% of cases; 62% of closed cases ended without relief. Overall risk signal: Moderate (44/100). This is an exploratory signal from public complaint data, not a regulatory, legal, or investment conclusion.
